zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir James Harroppe於1546年出生在英國英格蘭爾普雷斯特波利時，他的父親John Harrop20歲，母親Lady Agnes Turner19歲。他於大約1568年與Katheryn Barber在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1574年住在英國爾普雷斯特波利。他去世於1606年在英國英格蘭爾斯托普特享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir James Harroppe于1546年出生在英国英格兰爾普雷斯特波利时，他的父亲John Harrop20岁，母亲Lady Agnes Turner19岁。他于大约1568年与Katheryn Barber在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1574年住在英国爾普雷斯特波利。他去世于1606年在英国英格兰爾斯托普特享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Sir James Harroppe was born in 1546, in Prestbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Harrop, was 20 and his mother, Lady Agnes Turner, was 19. He married Katheryn Barber about 1568, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He lived in Prestbury, Cheshire, England in 1574. He died in 1606, in Stockport, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir James Harroppe est né en 1546, à Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Harrop, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes Turner, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Katheryn Barber environ 1568, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il a vécu à Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre en 1574. Il est décédé en 1606, à Stockport, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

Er starb 1606 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Stockport, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James Harroppe è nato il nel 1546 nel Prestbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Harrop, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Lady Agnes Turner, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Katheryn Barber circa 1568, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Vissuto a Prestbury, Cheshire, England nel 1574. Morì nel 1606, nel Stockport, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir James Harroppeが1546年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアプレストブリーで生まれた時，父John Harropは20歳，母Lady Agnes Turnerは19歳であった。約1568年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアでKatheryn Barberと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1574年にはイギリスチェシュアイアプレストブリーに住んでいた。彼は1606年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアストクプオルトで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir James Harroppe(이)가 1546년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 프레스트버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Harrop(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Agnes Turner(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1568년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Katheryn Barber(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1574년도에 영국 체실르 프레스트버이에서 살았다. 그는 1606년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 스톡포트에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Katheryn Barber aproximadamente 1568, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele viveu em Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra em 1574. Ele faleceu em 1606, em Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir James Harroppe родился в 1546 г. в местности престбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Harrop было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes Turner, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Katheryn Barber около 1568 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он жил в местности престбури, чешир, Англия в 1574 году. Он умер в 1606 г. в местности стоккпорт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.
